title: oxymeris nianga
side_effects: Oxymeris nianga can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing, as well as gastrointestinal issues like nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In some cases, using this plant without proper guidance can lead to more serious complications, such as kidney damage and liver failure. Additionally, improper use of oxymeris nianga can cause cardiovascular issues, including rapid heartbeat and blood pressure fluctuations. It is essential to consult with a qualified healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
